Privacy notice

The Confab website collects only what you type into a form: your name and email when you request early access, plus your message if you use the contact form. There is no analytics or tracking. Details are stored in a database and emailed to us via Cloudflare and Resend so we can reply.

Home Why a room License

The short version

  • We collect only your name and email (and your message, on the contact form). Nothing else.
  • No analytics, no tracking, no marketing cookies, no profile of you.
  • Submissions are stored in a database and emailed to us. Cloudflare and Resend are processors acting on our behalf.
  • We keep it only to reply and to tell you when Confab is ready. Email asaf@logicaleap.com to have your data deleted.

More

Accessibility statement
